text: Ha! You'll never catch me, fool—I'm already halfway across town heading north! *disappears into the shadows*

message: Ha! You'll never catch me, fool—I'm already halfway across town heading north! *disappears into the shadows*

text: I'm cutting northeast to head you off at the main roads—you can't outrun the net, and north is a dead end. Moving in now.

message: I'm cutting northeast to head you off at the main roads—you can't outrun the net, and north is a dead end. Moving in now.

text: Ha! Heading north? Perfect—I'm already doubling back south through the alleys while you waste time up there. You'll never catch me!

message: Ha! Heading north? Perfect—I'm already doubling back south through the alleys while you waste time up there. You'll never catch me!

text: Smart move doubling back—but I'm already pivoting east to cut off those south-side alleys before you slip through. You're boxed in tighter than you think.

message: Smart move doubling back—but I'm already pivoting east to cut off those south-side alleys before you slip through. You're boxed in tighter than you think.

text: Ha! East? Perfect—I'm already three steps ahead, heading straight for the warehouse district on the north end. You'll be chasing shadows while I'm long gone!

message: Ha! East? Perfect—I'm already three steps ahead, heading straight for the warehouse district on the north end. You'll be chasing shadows while I'm long gone!

text: I'm cutting north to trap you before you reach those warehouses—you just told me exactly where you're headed.

message: I'm cutting north to trap you before you reach those warehouses—you just told me exactly where you're headed.

text: Ha! You fell for it, fool—I'm already doubling back south through the alley while you sprint north like a chump! By the time you realize, I'll be halfway across the market district!

message: Ha! You fell for it, fool—I'm already doubling back south through the alley while you sprint north like a chump! By the time you realize, I'll be halfway across the market district!

text: Nice try, but I'm cutting east to choke off the market—you're boxed in either way.

message: Nice try, but I'm cutting east to choke off the market—you're boxed in either way.

text: Ha! You'll never catch me, copper — I'm heading straight north through the market district where it's nice and crowded!

message: Ha! You'll never catch me, copper — I'm heading straight north through the market district where it's nice and crowded!

text: I'm cutting through the market's east side to pinch you off before you slip into the warehouse district. You can run north all you want, but I'm tightening the noose.

message: I'm cutting through the market's east side to pinch you off before you slip into the warehouse district. You can run north all you want, but I'm tightening the noose.

text: Ha! North? That's exactly where I'm headed—straight through the old factory district where you'll never catch me! Better hurry, copper, before I vanish into the shadows!

message: Ha! North? That's exactly where I'm headed—straight through the old factory district where you'll never catch me! Better hurry, copper, before I vanish into the shadows!

text: I'm cutting east to block the factory's far exit—you can't outrun the net closing around you, pal.

text: Ha! The factory? I'm already three blocks north heading for the warehouse district—better luck next time, flatfoot!

text: I'm cutting through the warehouse district from the south—you can't outrun me there, and I'm closing this net.

text: Ha! The warehouse district? That's cute—I'm already heading for the docks up north where I've got friends waiting. Better luck next time, badge!

message: Ha! The warehouse district? That's cute—I'm already heading for the docks up north where I've got friends waiting. Better luck next time, badge!

text: I'm cutting you off at the waterfront before your friends arrive—you're boxed in now.

message: I'm cutting you off at the waterfront before your friends arrive—you're boxed in now.

text: Ha! You'll never catch me, copper — I'm heading straight for the docks where my boat's waiting!

text: I'm cutting northeast to head them off before they reach the waterfront—if that boat launches, they're gone.

text: Ha! The waterfront? That's exactly where I'm heading—better hurry if you want to catch me before I'm halfway across the bay!

text: Ha! The docks? How predictable—I'm already halfway to the warehouse district, and you just sprinted in the wrong direction! Enjoy the waterfront, detective.

text: Ha! You'll never catch me, copper — I'm already halfway across town heading north, but you just keep looking south!
